MOTION To Appoint Jeanne Reed As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS ARTHUR REED, JEANNE REED'S MOTION TO APPOINT JEANNE REED AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO, AND SUBSTITUTE SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR, DECEASED PLAINTIFF AND FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/JU) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
